# WWDCNotes

> Session notes shared by the community, for the community.

## Content Feeds

- [RSS Feed (all sections)](https://wwdcnotes.com/feed.xml): Full-text feed of all articles
- [Documentation RSS](https://wwdcnotes.com/documentation/feed.xml): Documentation only
- [Sitemap](https://wwdcnotes.com/sitemap.xml): Complete page index with last-modified dates

## Machine-Readable Indexes

- [Navigation Index](https://wwdcnotes.com/assets/nav-index.json): Structured metadata for all articles (title, summary, tags, URL, section) plus tag display names and app catalog
- [Full-Text Search Index](https://wwdcnotes.com/assets/search-index.json): Plain text content of all articles for search and analysis

## Sections

- [Documentation](https://wwdcnotes.com/documentation/): 2378 posts
